title: papaver × ashfordense
intro: Papaver × ashfordense is a hybrid poppy plant, a cross between Papaver rhoeas and Papaver dubium. The medicinal properties of Papaver × ashfordense include its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and stress, making it a potential natural remedy for conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Papaver × ashfordense include dried flowers, extracts, and teas, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
